title: Remove Caffeine.AI branding from footer

requirements.text: Remove the text 'Build with ❤️ using Caffeine.AI' and its associated link from the Footer component

quotes: Edit the website footer and remove the text: "Build with ❤️ using Caffeine.AI"
Completely clear this branding line from the bottom section of the website

acceptanceCriteria: The text 'Build with ❤️ using Caffeine.AI' is completely removed from the footer
No broken links or placeholder text remain in the footer
Footer only contains copyright text with salon name

requirements.text: Adjust footer padding and spacing to ensure no empty space or broken layout remains after removing the branding line

quotes: Ensure no empty space or broken layout remains

acceptanceCriteria: No awkward empty spaces are visible

requirements.text: Ensure the footer remains fully responsive on mobile devices with touch-friendly spacing and clean minimal design

quotes: Ensure the footer remains fully responsive on mobile devices
Keep the footer clean and professional
The final footer should look minimal, branded only with the salon's own name

acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays correctly on mobile screens (320px and up)
Footer text is readable on all device sizes
Footer maintains consistent styling with the rest of the site
Footer only displays salon branding, no third-party credits

constraints: Maintain existing footer styling and color scheme
nonGoals: Changing footer background colors or typography
